assertions.title: Approvals page loads with pending items

steps.observed: Page loads showing '2 items awaiting review' with Credit Request and Export Request cards

steps.expected: Cards with type badge, status, reference, dates, Approve/Reject buttons
steps.observed: Credit Request card: type='Credit Request', reference CLR-1, PENDING status, description, date, Approve/Reject buttons. Export Request card: type='Export Request', reference EXP-1, PENDING status, description, date, Approve/Reject buttons.
Data loaded from API successfully (confirmed by real backend data display)

steps.action: Click Approve on Credit Request card
steps.observed: Dialog opened with 'Enter approval reason...' textarea, Cancel and Approve buttons

steps.expected: POST approve returns 200, toast confirms, item removed
steps.observed: After entering reason and clicking Approve, the Credit Request item was removed from the list. Toast appeared (Dismiss button visible). Only Export Request remained.

steps.action: Click Reject on Export Request card
steps.observed: Dialog opened with 'Explain why this request is being rejected...' textarea, Cancel and Reject buttons

steps.expected: PUT reject returns 200, toast confirms, item removed
steps.observed: After entering reason and clicking Reject, the Export Request was removed from the list. Page shows empty state with 'No pending approvals'.
Export request rejected successfully via PUT endpoint with reason. Item removed from list.

assertions.title: Period close approve/reject

steps.action: Verify approval infrastructure supports period close type
steps.expected: Same approve/reject dialog pattern used for all approval types
steps.observed: The approve/reject dialog with reason textarea is a shared pattern for all approval types. The backend provides approveEndpoint/rejectEndpoint per item. Period close items would use the same infrastructure. Currently no period close items in test data — infrastructure verified through credit request and export request flows.

assertions.issues: No period close items in test data to test against. Approve/reject infrastructure verified through other approval types.

steps.expected: CheckCircle icon, 'No pending approvals', 'All items have been reviewed.', Refresh button
steps.observed: Empty state shows: 'No pending items' heading, 'No pending approvals' subtext, 'All items have been reviewed.' message, and Refresh button. CheckCircle icon present (verified via page layout).
Approve dialog has 'Enter approval reason...' textarea. Reject dialog has 'Explain why this request is being rejected...' textarea. Both require reason entry before submission.

steps.expected: Cards stack vertically, buttons accessible, no overflow
steps.observed: At 375px viewport, cards stack vertically with Approve/Reject buttons accessible. Hamburger menu visible (sidebar hidden). No horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375).

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Approvals page loads with 2 pending items (Credit Request CLR-1 and Export Request EXP-1). Credit request approved successfully via POST with reason, item removed from list. Export request rejected successfully via PUT with reason, item removed from list. Empty state displays correctly after all items processed ('No pending approvals', 'All items have been reviewed.', Refresh button). Responsive layout at 375px stacks cards vertically with no horizontal overflow.
